title: eclipta alba f. prostrata
intro: Eclipta alba f. prostrata, also known as Eclipta or Bhringaraj, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in North America, Asia, and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eclipta alba f. prostrata include promoting hair growth, reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. Eclipta alba f. prostrata can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
